title: justicia adhaerens
intro: Justicia adhaerens, also known as the sticky justicia or sticky bugweed, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and is part of the Acanthaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Justicia adhaerens include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Justicia adhaerens can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or boiling them in a decoction, which can then be used to treat various health conditions.
